notes: The game itself works well. But it does not show logos and videos, only sound. And it does not save the settings of the game, you must re-set each time you enter
title: Legacy of Kain: Soul Reaver

notes: The game works out of the box. All intro videos, sounds are perfect. But after 10-15 minutes the game unexpectedly crashes and quit to desktop. I have tried other graphic options at the start up but nothing changes.
title: Legacy of Kain: Soul Reaver

notes:
Tried this as an old favorite of mine, but just too broken to play.  

First tried at 4k resolution, native on my display(s), but simply made sound, and stuttrered through the intro until I killed the process.

Game launches at 1080p, but no intro FMV, or most of the intro.  You eventually get to non pre-rendered scenes that work, but controllers don't seem to function either using a ps4 controller under linux that normally works ok.  I can map keys in it, change buttons, but then they don't work in-game.  It wasn't worth trying to play via keyboard. 

I will experiment more with it, hopefully can be made to work, I love this game from on old days.
title: Legacy of Kain: Soul Reaver

notes:
Needs to start, and then quit before FMVs will play, but this old high school favorite of mine works FAR better than in the Windows version (which needed numerous patches just to start).  Also, via my Hori Fighting Commander, the game plays just as if it was on the original PS1.

Even the fan patches provided in the discussions have made it even nicer.
title: Legacy of Kain: Soul Reaver
